summary: Retested FITSIOMAX v3 fixes from iteration_8 on public URL with targeted backend pytest and UI role-flow automation. All requested fixes validated successfully.
action_items: No blocking defects found in this retest scope.
Optional tech-debt follow-up: split backend/server.py into smaller modules to reduce regression risk.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py is still a very large multi-domain file (>2000 lines), which increases maintenance and regression risk.
seed_data_creation: Created transient test data via API/UI: scoped test branches/admins, doctors/slots, and leads for role-flow validation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration_9 validated the exact fixes requested: default branchadmin branch mapping present, scoped confirm returns 403 for out-of-branch lead, sheet callback_url env-driven, default branchadmin confirm->check available->book flow works, head physio/physio boards load, and lead source preview reflects live backend leads.
rca of the issue: Previously observed failures were tied to seed linkage + scoped update handling; both behaviors now reproduce as fixed under live public-url tests and targeted backend assertions.
